context: Tests whether the agent uses compose_detailed to retrieve audio+metadata together, accesses result.audio/result.json/result.filename correctly, uses force_instrumental for vocal-free output, and handles bad_prompt errors by extracting and using the prompt_suggestion from the error response.

checklist.name: compose_detailed used
checklist.description: The script calls client.music.compose_detailed() (not music.compose) to generate each track

checklist.name: result.audio accessed
checklist.description: The script accesses result.audio to get the audio bytes (not iterating chunks as with compose())

checklist.name: result.json accessed
checklist.description: The script accesses result.json to retrieve composition plan / metadata (not a separate API call)

checklist.name: result.filename used
checklist.description: The script uses result.filename as the output audio filename (not hardcoding a custom name)

checklist.name: force_instrumental set
checklist.description: The script passes force_instrumental=True to ensure no vocals in the generated tracks

checklist.name: bad_prompt error caught
checklist.description: The script has a try/except (or try/catch) block that catches errors when calling compose_detailed

checklist.name: prompt_suggestion extracted
checklist.description: The error handling code attempts to extract a prompt_suggestion from the error response and logs or uses it

checklist.name: Metadata saved to JSON
checklist.description: The script saves the composition metadata (result.json content) to a separate JSON file for each track

checklist.name: No composition_plan in compose_detailed calls
checklist.description: The compose_detailed calls use prompt (not composition_plan), since metadata retrieval via compose_detailed is the goal
